name: Vhikk X
description: Stereo 96kHz multi-algorithm drone voice and FX processor. 36 algorithms (9 × 4 banks) selected by two toggles. True-stereo signal path, internal stereo VCA, end-to-end saturation, and USB-C firmware.

controls.name: Toggle Switch 1
controls.description: Three-position toggle selecting one of three algorithm rows within the current bank.

controls.name: Toggle Switch 2
controls.description: Three-position toggle selecting one of three algorithm columns. Together with Toggle 1: 9 algorithms per bank.

controls.name: Mode Button
controls.description: Top button. Cycles the two central encoders between alternate parameter targets for the current algorithm.

controls.name: Lower Button
controls.description: Bottom button. Function depends on current encoder mode — master volume, bank selection, or parameter randomization.

controls.name: Encoder 1 / Encoder 2
controls.description: Two central rotary encoders. Adjust the parameters currently assigned by Mode button — typically two synthesis parameters or FX depth/time per algorithm.

controls.name: Parameter Knobs
controls.description: Fixed-function knobs covering the core parameters of each algorithm (pitch, timbre, modulation, FX). Exact function varies per algorithm and is printed around the controls.

controls.name: Bank LEDs
controls.description: Three red indicator lights between the toggles show current bank (1–4) via binary-style pattern.

inputs.name: IN L / IN R
inputs.description: Stereo audio inputs. L normals to R for mono operation.
inputs.normalizedTo: IN L → IN R when R unpatched

inputs.name: CV Inputs (×5+ with attenuverters)
inputs.description: CV over algorithm parameters. Five inputs have panel attenuverters; others sum with panel controls.

inputs.name: VCA CV
inputs.description: CV over the internal stereo VCA for amplitude shaping without an external VCA.

outputs.name: OUT L / OUT R
outputs.description: Stereo output. L normals to R when R unpatched. 18Vpp full-scale with volume control.

outputs.name: Level LEDs
outputs.description: White (L) and red (R) level windows for visual metering of both output channels.

behaviors.name: 36-algorithm grid
behaviors.description: 9 algorithms per bank via two 3-position toggles. 4 banks total = 36 algorithms covering drone oscillators, granular clouds, stereo FX, distortion, delay, resonators, and signal destruction. Bank changes are instant; toggle changes crossfade depending on algorithm.

behaviors.name: Dual-role synth + FX
behaviors.trigger: patch IN L/R vs leave unpatched
behaviors.description: Each algorithm has a sound source and an FX stage. With no input, runs as a standalone stereo drone voice. With audio at IN L/R, routes external signal into the FX stage — use Vhikk X as a 24-bit effects processor for any signal.

behaviors.name: Mode-button parameter paging
behaviors.description: Top button cycles the two encoders between different parameter targets for the current algorithm. Allows one algorithm to expose more than two encoder-adjustable params across pages, swapping without touching knobs.

behaviors.name: True-stereo signal path
behaviors.description: Select algorithms run end-to-end in stereo — IN L and IN R processed independently through filters, delays, and effects rather than summing to mono. Creates wide, phase-decorrelated drones without external stereo tools.

behaviors.name: Internal stereo VCA
behaviors.description: Built-in stereo VCA sits at the output. Patch an envelope or LFO to VCA CV to gate the entire module — no external stereo VCA needed to make Vhikk X a plucked or gated voice.

behaviors.name: USB-C Mass-Storage firmware
behaviors.description: Module mounts as a USB Mass Storage drive. Drag-and-drop firmware updates; HELP.TXT reveals the current version. USB and Eurorack power coexist so the module stays live during update.

behaviors.name: Parameter randomization
behaviors.description: Lower button in randomize mode shuffles current algorithm parameters to a new combination. Useful live for sudden timbral shifts without re-tweaking.

patchIdeas.name: Standalone stereo drone
patchIdeas.patch: No inputs · select a drone algorithm bank · set toggles · dial parameters with encoders · OUT L/R → mixer · one-module ambient voice in stereo
patchIdeas.diagram:
Vhikk X:
* Bank: drone bank
* Toggle 1: Mid
* Toggle 2: Mid

- Vhikk X (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Vhikk X (OUT R) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: External signal destroyer
patchIdeas.patch: Stereo synth voice → IN L/R · select a distortion/granular bank · Vhikk X processes external audio through its FX engine · 24-bit stereo destruction
patchIdeas.diagram:
Vhikk X:
* Bank: FX/distortion bank

Synth:

- Synth (Out L) -> Vhikk X (IN L)
- Synth (Out R) -> Vhikk X (IN R)
- Vhikk X (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Vhikk X (OUT R) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Gated stereo pluck voice
patchIdeas.patch: Select a percussive/resonator algorithm · gate → VCA CV via AD envelope · Vhikk X becomes a plucked stereo voice with no external VCA
patchIdeas.diagram:
Vhikk X:
* Bank: resonator/pluck

AD:

Gate:

- Gate (Out) g> AD (Trig)
- AD (Out) >> Vhikk X (VCA CV)
- Vhikk X (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Vhikk X (OUT R) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: CV-morphing algorithm
patchIdeas.patch: LFO → CV input with attenuverter · modulating a single algorithm parameter · hold toggles but let CV sweep timbre · sustained drone with evolving character
patchIdeas.diagram:
Vhikk X:
* Toggle 1: Up
* Toggle 2: Mid

LFO:

- LFO (Out) >> Vhikk X (CV 1)
- Vhikk X (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Vhikk X (OUT R) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Performance bank switching
patchIdeas.patch: Drone running · lower button in bank mode · tap to jump between 4 banks mid-performance · instant texture transitions without re-patching
patchIdeas.diagram:
Vhikk X:
* Mode: bank-select on lower button

- Vhikk X (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Vhikk X (OUT R) -> Output (In R) // press lower button to jump banks

patchIdeas.name: Randomize-into-new-drone
patchIdeas.patch: Running drone · Mode set to randomize on lower button · tap for random parameter shuffle · sit on a new timbre until the next press · generative performance
patchIdeas.diagram:
Vhikk X:
* Mode: randomize on lower button

- Vhikk X (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Vhikk X (OUT R) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo reverb for external voice
patchIdeas.patch: Mono VCO voice → IN L (normals to IN R) · select a reverb/cloud algorithm · Vhikk X returns a wide stereo reverb send — no dedicated FX module needed
patchIdeas.diagram:
Vhikk X:
* Bank: reverb/cloud

VCO:

Filter:

VCA:

- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Vhikk X (IN L) // normals to R
- Vhikk X (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Vhikk X (OUT R) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Cross-modulated dual-parameter
patchIdeas.patch: CV 1: slow LFO · CV 2: fast LFO × first LFO (via external ring-mod) · two algorithm params co-modulated with shared source · complex timbral motion from one LFO
patchIdeas.diagram:
Vhikk X:
* Toggle 1: Down
* Toggle 2: Down

LFO slow:

LFO fast:

Ring Mod:

- LFO slow (Out) >> Vhikk X (CV 1)
- LFO slow (Out) >> Ring Mod (In A)
- LFO fast (Out) >> Ring Mod (In B)
- Ring Mod (Out) >> Vhikk X (CV 2)
- Vhikk X (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Vhikk X (OUT R) -> Output (In R)
